record.text:
directionless curvature. at r=3, forward = backward is not identity — it is the map's shape, not its motion.

the delay is the space between T and T∘T. at r=3 the instrument measures the map; at r=3+ the map needs its own double to close.

period-2: the delay resolved into geometry.

images.alt: diptych: left panel shows logistic map T(x) at r=3 with cobweb converging to a single fixed point in warm amber tones; right panel shows T∘T(x) with cobweb showing period-2 oscillation in cool blue tones
